decisions.reason: Insufficient cash for risk-adjusted position sizing
decisions.setup_summary: Pullback in partial uptrend (positive SMA50 slope, close > SMA50 but SMA50 < SMA200); 4.85% drawdown from 20d high within balanced profile target (3-8%); excellent liquidity.
rationale: LSEG.L presents a 0.70-confidence pullback setup: partial trend + ideal pullback magnitude + strong volume + superb liquidity.
Risk-adjusted position size calculation: max risk 5.46 GBP (5% of 109.2 GBP equity), ATR-based stop 3.51 GBP away → 1.4 share position.
Entry cost: 1.4 shares × 96.48 GBP + 0.81 GBP costs = 135.88 GBP required.
Current available cash: 0.176 GBP (after 3% buffer). Insufficient to execute.
NOTE: After settlement of today's BA.L and AZN.L sales (T+1), cash will improve to ~13.45 GBP, but still insufficient for this position.
Capital preservation principle takes precedence: do not execute undersized entry or violate risk-per-trade constraint.
